text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the big day. Nishino Flower will finally
debut in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sure things will go fine.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I trained really, really hard. So I'll be okay...
Right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you... Let's head to the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Did you see all the racers debuting today?
There's this one named Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, they're talking about me.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
She enrolled at the academy early, yeah? It's
impressive, sure, but she's still just a kid. I wonder
if she's up to this?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, this is Tracen Academy we're talking
about. They're sure to have a great support
system in place.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
But her trainer seems pretty inexperienced. I
really hope she's been receiving proper guidance.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower has been really quiet for a while
now. Hearing people talk about her might have
shaken her confidence. Even so...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You've been saying the same thing all day.
choice_data_list: Sorry I'm not a better motivator...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I didn't mean it like that! I'm really happy
you're cheering me on like this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I can do this. I trust you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
But her trainer seems pretty inexperienced. I
really hope she's been receiving proper guidance.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer might be new and inexperienced, but
they've done everything in their power to guide
me here.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (If I give it my all today... If I can really do this...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Then maybe everyone watching will see Trainer
in a new light.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...All right. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's time to show them all that I have the
hardest-working trainer on the planet!
